description: Welcome to the ever popular Cinema District! This stunning modern 3-bed, 3-bathroom townhouse in Abbotsford’s University District features an open concept main living area, with quartz countertops, stainless steel appliances, and includes A/C and a massive roof top patio with breathtaking views of Mt. Baker. Featuring a 2-car garage with access to your own private backyard, perfect for pets or someone with a green thumb to grow their own vegetables. Located within walking distance of the University of the Fraser Valley, Rogers Forum, McCallum Junction shops and restaurants, and Highway 1 for commuters. This one is not to be missed!
